description: Substance Abuse Morphus table (Dark Designs pp. 55–58). Features reflect drugs of choice; typically 01–60% active addiction, 61–80% history of abuse, or 81–00% family history/fear of addiction without personal dependency.

entries.name: Hypodermic Quills
entries.description: Hollow needles from back, shoulders, and arms—poison sloshing in visible chambers or leaking from the tips.
customOneOffs: +2 strike and +2 parry with syringe only.

Claw slash 1D4 bleeding; on piercing hit may inject poison (save vs poison 14+): +2D4 H.P. damage; -1 combat and Perception per failed save 1D4 minutes (max -5). Half effect vs supernatural/magical (1D4 H.P., 1 minute).
May remove one or two syringes for poisoned dagger/spike attacks.

entries.name: Pills
entries.description: Pills inset in flesh, transparent pill-bottle flesh, or capsules erupting as pimples and warts—picked and eaten for a buzz.
customOneOffs: +2 to save vs drugs and poison (partially in saveModifiers.poison).

Pill duration 1D4+2 minutes unless noted; after-effects 2D4+4 minutes unless noted. Oral ingestion, effect in 1D4 melee rounds. Save 16+ vs non-lethal poison when unwilling; no save when taken willingly. One pill type at a time; new pill replaces prior bonuses; penalties stack in order taken.
Anti-Toxin (1D4+2): settles stomach, stops vomiting, helps hangover (half duration), restores 1D4 H.P. from poison.
Booster (1D4+6): +2 Perception, +1 initiative, awake 1D4+2 hours. After: -4 Perception, -2 initiative, -20% all skills 1D6+6 hours or 7 hours sleep.
Fat (1D4+4): no hunger 1D4+4 hours. After: -1 Perception/initiative, -1 all combat, -10% Spd for 1D6+4 hours.

Happy (2D6+3): +4 save vs H.F., +5% all skills under fire; -4 Perception, -4 initiative, -20% Spd, prefers talk/drink to fight. After: -1 H.F. save, -10% skills (double under death), -4 Perception/initiative, -20% Spd 1D6×10 minutes.

Hallucinogenic (1D4+2): on failed save, -6 Perception, -5 initiative, -3 strike/parry/dodge, -4 H.F./illusion saves, -30% skills for 1D4 minutes. After: -2 Perception/initiative, -10% skills, -2 H.F./illusion saves 1 hour.

Magic (1D4+1): +1 all magic/illusion/disease/poison/mind-control saves, +2 possession; doubled vs Nightlands/Nightlords/demons/Nightbane. After: -1 magic/illusion/mind-control/poison, -2 possession vs Nightlords/Nightlands/demons 1D6+6 minutes.
Painkillers (2D4+4): half pain penalties; -2 Perception/initiative, -1 all combat, -5% skills while active.
Sedatives (1D4+4): on failed save, half attacks/Spd/skills, zero combat bonuses 1D6+2 minutes; save 4 or less = deep sleep. After: -1 combat, -10% Spd, -5% skills 2D6+2 minutes.
Steroids (2D4+2): +1D4+4 P.S., +2D6+10 S.D.C. (damage hits S.D.C. first), +2 initiative; aggressive. After: P.S. -1D6 below normal, -4 initiative, -20% Spd, sluggish 2D4+4 minutes.

entries.name: Alcohol-Soaked
entries.description: Permanently drunk-stumbling Morphus—clothing soaked through, liquor dripping, smell pervasive.
customOneOffs: Never has a hangover; interrogators -30% Interrogation vs this Nightbane.
Cold attacks, even magical, only do 10% of normal damage (cold/ice damageAffinities).
Poor memory and blackouts.
50% chance to catch fire from fire attacks (+3D6 damage/round for 1D6+4 rounds until extinguished).

entries.name: Branded Loyalty
entries.description: 1D6+1 product brands burned into forearms, chest, hands, wrists, neck, or face—alcohol, tobacco, or drug logos.
customOneOffs: Impervious to negative effects and disease from branded products.

entries.name: Rolling Paper or Leafy Skin
entries.description: Overlapping leaves or cigarette-rolling paper skin; yellowing patches, smoldering cigarette-like eyes, wisps of smoke and tobacco breath.
customOneOffs: Smoke has no adverse effect in Morphus form.

entries.name: Pipe Throat
entries.description: Metal or glass throat tubing—raspy Darth Vader voice, glowing pipe, acrid smoke shroud.
customOneOffs: Immune to smoke, sulfur, tear gas, and similar airborne toxins/poisons.
Blowing Smoke: rings/signals, or gust in opponent’s face (3 ft)—-1 Perception and all combat rolls one melee round.
-1 strike with ranged weapons due to obscuring smoke; persistent cough.

entries.name: Rotted Teeth
entries.description: Brown/yellow cracked teeth—1D4×10% missing; discolored gums and rancid breath.
customOneOffs: Bite double damage vs Nightlords and demonic minions.
Stench gust (4 ft): save vs non-lethal poison 16+; fail = -3 Perception, -2 all combat one round (01–30% vomit, lose one melee). Save = -1 Perception one round.

entries.name: 'Roid-Rage
entries.description: Strained oversized muscles, bulging veins, heavy breathing—angry or mad expression; ignores injury.
customOneOffs: Does not feel pain; fights beyond rational limits and may not notice S.D.C./H.P. nearing zero.
Aggressive, quick to anger and violence.

entries.name: Speed Freak
entries.description: Gaunt, hollow-cheeked, visible ribs, trembling hands—nervous energy as if sleepless and starved for days.
customOneOffs: Talks fast, lives hard; daredevil thrill-junkie—risks danger to self and allies.
-10% on skills requiring a delicate touch due to trembling.
